title: 🎉 New Feature: Job Alerts
description: You can now subscribe to personalised job alerts! Set your preferences in your profile and we'll notify you whenever new matching jobs are posted. Stay ahead of the competition — never miss a relevant opportunity.

title: 📢 Website Update – May 2026
description: We've improved our job search filters, added new job categories, and made the mobile experience faster and smoother. Thank you for being part of the FindJobsInFinland community — your feedback keeps making us better!

title: 💡 Tip: Complete Your Profile
description: Users with a complete profile — including job preferences, languages, and location — receive more accurate job matches. Head to your profile page to fill in any missing details and boost your chances of finding the right job in Finland.
